summary: Curiosity velocity frames YouTube history as an alternation between exploration, convergence, deep dives, and deliberate pivots rather than random topic hopping.
notes: Windows are trailing 90-day slices from January 2022 onward, because that is where search history provides a credible topical spine.
Watch events are labeled with a conservative blend of direct keyword matches, nearby search-session context, repeated-title priors, and channel priors.

broad_exploration.label: Broad exploration
broad_exploration.summary: Wide topical spread, fast switching, and low single-topic dominance.

narrowing.label: Narrowing
narrowing.summary: Curiosity starts to converge as one line of inquiry gains share.

deep_dive.label: Deep dive
deep_dive.summary: Sustained concentration, longer runs, and lower entropy.

pivot.label: Domain pivot
pivot.summary: A sharp rotation after a focused period, usually into a different topical cluster.

return.label: Return
return.summary: A previously important theme comes back after a meaningful gap.

balanced.label: Balanced synthesis
balanced.summary: Neither scattered nor locked in; multiple lines of inquiry coexist.

overview.label: Windows analyzed
overview.detail: Rolling 90-day windows across the high-confidence portion of the watch history.

overview.label: Strongest deep dive
overview.detail: Sustained concentration, longer runs, and lower entropy.

overview.label: Pivot windows
overview.detail: Sharp switches after concentrated focus periods.

overview.label: Return windows
overview.detail: Earlier themes resurfacing after a meaningful gap.

overview.label: Broadest window
overview.detail: Wide topical spread, fast switching, and low single-topic dominance.

highlights.title: Deepest concentration: Deep dive
highlights.label: Jul 2022
highlights.body: Focus share reached 49% with average same-topic runs of 2.4 events.

highlights.title: Broadest range: Broad exploration
highlights.label: Mar 2025
highlights.body: Entropy hit 0.90 with switching at 68% of adjacent events.

highlights.title: Most visible pivot: Domain pivot
highlights.label: Apr 2022
highlights.body: A concentrated streak gives way to a sharper topical jump than the surrounding months.
